name: chain_gov_contract_va_general_mental_health_
method: [GOV CONTRACT] VA GENERAL MENTAL HEALTH AND SUICIDE PREVENTION AWARENESS AND EDUCATION OUTREACH SERVICES (deadline: 2027-03-03)

stages.task: Pull full solicitation text from SAM.gov via Playwright MCP, extract: scope of work, NAICS code, set-aside type, estimated value, incumbent, evaluation criteria

Score PRINTMAXX fit: (1) proposal writing subcontract play, (2) content/media subcontract play, (3) direct bid viability. Extract all named deliverables that map to existing PRINTMAXX capabilities (outreach content, social media, educational materials)

Find prime contractors registered under NAICS 923120/541611 with active VA vehicles (SEWP, CIO-SP3, GSA). Generate 3 cold email variants: teaming-offer angle, subcontract-content-production angle, proposal-writing-services angle. Load from eas_lead_pipeline.py
